privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on synthetically generated Sentrifugo HRMS data injected directly into a local MySQL instance via shell scripts. The expected new Business Unit is explicitly 'Acme Corp Technology', the departments slated for transfer ('Engineering', 'Data Science', 'DevOps & Infrastructure', 'Quality Assurance') and the departments intended to remain at HQ ('Sales', 'Marketing', 'Finance & Accounting', 'Human Resources', 'Customer Support', 'Product Development') perfectly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
